scripts.python:test: PYTHONPATH=contracts/generated/python:workers/code-intel/src:workers/review/src python3 -m unittest discover -s workers/code-intel/tests/unit -p 'test_*.py' && PYTHONPATH=contracts/generated/python:workers/code-intel/src:workers/review/src python3 -m unittest discover -s workers/review/tests/unit -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.check: pnpm contracts:check && pnpm runtime:typecheck && pnpm runtime:build && pnpm runtime:test
